span.p: EventType Routing

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Meal Bolus / Snack Bolus
→ Bolus + CarbIntake

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Correction Bolus
→ Bolus

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Carb Correction
→ CarbIntake

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
BG Check
→ BGCheck

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Bolus Wizard
→ BolusCalculation + Bolus

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Note / Announcement
→ Note

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Site Change, Sensor Start, ...
→ DeviceEvent

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Profile Switch, Temp Override, ...
→ StateSpan

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Override rule:
insulin > 0 AND carbs > 0
→ always Bolus + CarbIntake
regardless of eventType

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Notes rule:
non-empty notes field
→ always produces a Note
alongside other records

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
eventType (string)
determines meaning of
all other fields

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
insulin, programmed
delivered, unabsorbed
insulinType, automatic

span.p:
carbs, protein, fat
foodType, carbTime
absorptionTime

span.p:
glucose, glucoseType
mgdl, mmol, units

span.p:
bloodGlucoseInput, insulinOnBoard
insulinRecommendation, CR
calculationType, splitNow/Ext

span.p:
rate, duration
absolute, percent

span.p: notes (freeform text)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: enteredBy, syncIdentifier

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
profile, profileJson
targetTop, targetBottom
reason, durationType

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Bolus
insulin, programmed, delivered
bolusType, kind, automatic
bolusCalculationId (FK)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CarbIntake
carbs, carbTime
absorptionTime

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
BGCheck
glucose, glucoseType
units, mgdl, mmol

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BolusCalculation
bgInput, carbInput, IOB
recommendation, carbRatio
calculationType

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TempBasal
start/endTimestamp
rate, scheduledRate, origin
(span-based, not IV4Record)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Note
text, eventType
isAnnouncement

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
DeviceEvent
eventType (enum)
SiteChange, SensorStart
PodChange, etc.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
StateSpan
Profile Switch
Temporary Override
Temporary Target

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
IOB vs COB are separate calculations
Insulin on board depends only on
boluses and pharmacokinetics.
Carbs on board depends only on
intake and absorption time.
Bundling them conflates two
independent calculation domains.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Measurements are not actions
A finger-stick BG check is an
observation, not a treatment.
Grouping it with insulin delivery
corrupts 'show me all treatments'
queries with passive readings.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Decisions vs delivery
A bolus calculator captures why
a dose was chosen. The bolus
itself captures what was delivered.
Not every calculation produces a
bolus; not every bolus comes from
a calculator. Separating them
enables decision-chain auditing.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Point events vs time spans
Boluses are instantaneous.
Temp basals and profile switches
are active for a duration.
They need start/end timestamps
and state-tracking infrastructure
that point-event models lack.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Freeform text vs structured data
Notes are annotations on the
timeline. Any record can carry
notes (bolus, device event, etc.)
Separating them avoids bloating
every model with a notes field
and lets notes exist standalone.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Device lifecycle vs clinical events
Site changes, sensor starts,
and pod changes are hardware
maintenance, not clinical therapy.
A strongly-typed enum replaces
fragile string matching and
enables 'last site change?' queries.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Polymorphic blob prevents type safety
One class with ~100 nullable fields
means any field can appear on any
record. Decomposed models enforce
which fields belong where at the
schema level, not by convention.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
APS algorithm vs manual actions
SMBs from AAPS and auto-boluses
from Loop are fundamentally
different from manual corrections.
Bolus.Kind (Algorithm vs Manual)
and Automatic flag distinguish
them for safety analysis.
